dialogue.text: The speaker pauses, choosing their words with care. Though the world seems quiet, their purpose remains firm.

lore.text: Ancient records speak of this through fragments and shadows. The true depth remains hidden for now.

narration.text: The air grows heavy with untold stories. Your path continues through the shifting mists of time.

description.text: The surroundings are etched in sharp detail, a quiet stillness hanging over the landscape as you observe.
